SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.reactor

Class PartialOxidationReactor

java.lang.Object
neqsim.util.NamedBaseClass
neqsim.process.SimulationBaseClass
neqsim.process.equipment.ProcessEquipmentBaseClass
neqsim.process.equipment.TwoPortEquipment
neqsim.process.equipment.reactor.PartialOxidationReactor
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Runnable, ProcessEquipmentInterface, TwoPortInterface, ProcessElementInterface, SimulationInterface, NamedInterface
public class PartialOxidationReactor extends TwoPortEquipment
Partial oxidation reactor model for high-temperature syngas production.

The model applies oxygen-to-carbon control, adiabatic high-temperature equilibrium in a SyngasBurnerZone, optional fast quench, refractory-temperature screening, and soot/coke risk metrics. It is suitable for route comparison and process integration studies before a detailed burner, refractory, or soot-kinetics model is available.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors
See Also:
